name: Tumbleweed, Pinto Bean, & Wild Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Tumbleweed greens or curly endive, or fennel tops
3 tablespoons Herb flavored red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in water to cover.
2. In the morning, drain the beans and rinse them under cold running water.
3. Place the beans in a saucepan with fresh water to cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce the heat and simmer several hours until the beans are soft and the skins begin to split. Add water when necessary to keep the beans from drying out, and stir occasionally to prevent them from burning and sticking.
5. Remove from the heat, drain, and allow to cool.
6. In a bowl, toss together the greens, beans, and rice. Cover and chill in the refrigerator at least 30 minutes.
7. In a blender, combine the oil, vinegar, chives, garlic, pepper, and salt. Blend at high speed until the chives and garlic are finely pureed.
8. Pour the dressing over the salad, toss, and garnish with chive blossoms.
